driftThreshold.description: Number of consecutive directional mutations required to trigger an overfitting/looping warning

id.description: Unique identifier for this physics profile (e.g., 'omc.physics.standard')

maxVelocity.description: Maximum allowed percentage change in a single mutation (Velocity)

minSignificance.description: P-value stability boundary required for overriding radical systemic changes

description: Defines the hard mathematical limits for execution mutation. Governs maxVelocity, minSignificance, and driftThresholds for the Domicile Vagus Nerve.
title: omc.v3.physics-threshold
